title: Adjustable document support apparatus
abstract: The present disclosure provides an adjustable document support apparatus configured to provide an elevated surface above a keyboard so that a user can keep their documents within easy reach and eyeline of a computer screen without obstructing the keyboard itself. The legs of the apparatus are adjustable, allowing for ergonomic placement of the documents to suit users of different sizes and in different sitting positions. The support panel atop which the documents rest may also be transparent to ensure a clear view of the keyboard beneath.
claims:
Claims Claims What is claimed is: 1. A document support apparatus comprising: a support panel comprising a first flat surface configured to support one or more documents; and two or more adjustable legs of variable length, each adjustable leg having a first end attached to an edge of the support panel and being configured to hold the support panel in an elevated position above a keyboard. 2. A document support apparatus according to claim 1, wherein the support panel is rectangular and the apparatus comprises four adjustable legs arranged at each corner of the support panel. 3. A document support apparatus according to claim 2, wherein an opposing second end of each adjustable leg comprises a connector element configured to connect to a corner of a laptop device. 4. A document support apparatus according to claim 2, wherein the four adjustable legs are divided into a first pair arranged at a first pair of adjacent corners of the support panel and a second pair arranged at a second pair of adjacent corners of the support panel, the first pair having a first maximum length and the second pair having a second maximum length, the first maximum length being greater than the second maximum length. 5. A document support apparatus according to claim 1, wherein the support panel is transparent. 6. A document support apparatus according to claim 5, wherein the support panel is formed of transparent acrylic. 7. A document support apparatus according to claim 1, wherein the apparatus further comprises a clip mechanism disposed on the support panel for securing one or more document in place on the first surface. 8. A document support apparatus according to claim 1, wherein the adjustable legs are each formed of two or more leg elements coupled to one another by hinged connections, and the length of the legs is adjusted by varying the angle between the leg elements. 

A document support apparatus according to claim 1, wherein the adjustable legs are telescopic. A document support apparatus according to claim 1, wherein the apparatus further comprises a locking mechanism configured to lock the length of the adjustable legs.
